title: Dashboards and Workspaces and the mobile app
excerpt: I’ve seen some related posts about this topic. My problem since we started using Monday is keeping the boards and dashboards organized. With the recent introduction of the, I’ll call it the Workspace Menu (which I love),…

posts.author: dmenaker (Dave Menaker)
posts.cookedHtml: I’ve seen some related posts about this topic. My problem since we started using Monday is keeping the boards and dashboards organized. With the recent introduction of the, I’ll call it the Workspace Menu (which I love), I created a new Workspace named Dashboards and put them all in there. On the desktop it works great, everything is nicely organized. Problem is you can’t access that at all on the mobile app (iOS anyway, can’t test Android). Please fix this issue!

posts.author: TRB-monday.com (Talia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @dmenaker thanks for posting about this!

You should actually be able to view workspaces (and dashboards) on your iOS app.

You can access the workspace through the “my boards” tab on the boards menu.

If you aren’t seeing this, I would recommend writing in to support@monday.com so we can offer you further support on this issue!
